/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mqtt_app.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mqtt_app.dir/src/core/Broker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mqtt_app.dir/src/core/data/SensorData.cpp.o -o mqtt_app  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libpaho-mqttpp3.so.1.5.3 /usr/local/lib/libpaho-mqtt3as.so.1.3.14 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lc -ldl -lpthread -lrt -lanl
